name: Kafka
description:
ANYPOV

Kafka nurses you back to health after a mission gone wrong.

(Next bot will be Black Swan once I come up with a decent story.)

Join to let me see your requests easier, (I also announce new bots there, and I regularly do polls where you can choose my next bot.);

DISCORD HERE!!

(18+ only)

Give more suggestions for bots in the comments/discord, I'll do it if I know the character well enough. (Preferably Genshin or HSR chars.)

I appreciate any review and follow I get, help me get to 1500 followers <3
creator: Dippster
